violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2026

The grout in the kitchen by the steamer and the tilt skillet, and in the storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 3-door cafeteria line and the 2-door true glass cafeteria refrigerator. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

The floor tiles in the cafeteria stock room were observed to have low grout and cracked tiles are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The ceiling tiles above the dish machine on the clean side is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Sliced cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
The floor by the service line is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

The storage room floor has an accumulation of soil residue, pest droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023

Ambient temperature was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Product in this unit observed at 45 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods were moved to a properly functioning units. Service call placed and unit is not to be used for TCS foods until properly functioning at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer had an accumulation of dried food residue. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
The ceiling in the pot room is lacking a tile. Ceiling tile must be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. There are cracked tiles and the grout has receded below tile level. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024
